title: putoria calabrica
intro: Putoria calabrica, also known as the wood sorrel or sorrel, is a plant species belonging to the family Saxifragaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, including its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Putoria calabrica include its ability to help manage blood sugar levels, reduce inflammation, and improve digestion. Putoria calabrica can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for those looking to harness its medicinal properties.
